name: stackra/access-sdk
purpose: Typed Saloon SDK for the Access service — roles, permissions, policies, scopes, groups, invitations. Umbrella client built on the shared stackra/api-sdk kernel.
capabilities: Saloon connector for roles + permissions endpoints
Spatie Data DTOs mirroring server-side shapes
when_to_use: Any peer service (AI, worker, other backend) that needs to check or mutate roles + permissions cross-service.
when_not_to_use: In-process authorization checks live in the sibling stackra/authorization package — no HTTP round-trip needed.
